Lab 04

Christopher Moore

10/4/2021

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.dim=c(6,6))
library(package = "deSolve")
library(package = "phaseR")
## -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## phaseR: Phase plane analysis of one- and two-dimensional autonomous ODE systems
## -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## v.2.1: For an overview of the package's functionality enter: ?phaseR
## 
## For news on the latest updates enter: news(package = "phaseR")

Single-species solutions

Discrete-time models

N0 <- 0.05
K <- 8
r <- 1.2
steps <- 50
N_vec <- rep(x = NA, times = steps)
N_vec[1] <- N0

for (i in 2:steps) {
  Nt <- N_vec[i-1]
  Nt1 <- Nt*r*(K - Nt)/K
  N_vec[i] <- Nt1
}
plot(x = 1:steps, y = N_vec, pch  = 16)

Continuous-time models

log_fun <- function(time, state, pars) {
  with(as.list(c(state, pars)), {
    dN <- r*N*(K - N)/K
    return(list(c(dN)))
  })
}

times_vec <- seq(from = 0, to = 50, by = 0.01)
parms_vec <- c(K = 8, r = 0.2)
init_vec <- c(N = 0.05)

ode_out <- ode(y = init_vec, times = times_vec, func = log_fun, parms = parms_vec)

plot(x = ode_out[,1], ode_out[,2], type = "l")

Two-species solutions

Discrete-time models

N0 <- c(N1 = 0.05, N2 = 0.1)
K <- 8
r <- 1.2
a1 <- 0.3
a2 <- 0.9
steps <- 50

N_mat <- matrix(data = NA, nrow = steps, ncol = 2)
  colnames(N_mat) <- c("N1", "N2")

N_mat[1,] <- N0

for (i in 2:steps) {
  N1t <- N_mat[i-1, 1]
  N2t <- N_mat[i-1, 2]
  N1t1 <- r*N1t*(K - N1t + a1*N2t)/K
  N2t1 <- r*N2t*(K - N2t + a2*N1t)/K
  N_mat[i,] <- c(N1t1, N2t1)
}

y_lims <- c(0, max(N_mat))

plot(x = 1:steps, y = N_mat[,1], pch = 16, ylim = y_lims)
  points(x = 1:steps, y = N_mat[,2], col = "tomato", pch = 16)

Continuous-time models

mut_fun <- function(time, state, parms) {
  with(as.list(c(state, parms)), {
    dN1 <- r*N1*(K - N1 + a1*N2)/K
    dN2 <- r*N2*(K - N2 + a2*N1)/K
    return(list(c(dN1, dN2)))
  })
}

times_vec <- seq(from = 0, to = 50, by = 0.01)
parms_vec <- c(K = 8, r = 0.2, a1 = 0.3, a2 = 0.9)
init_vec <- c(N1 = 0.05, N2 = 0.1)

ode_out <- ode(y = init_vec, times = times_vec, func = mut_fun, parms = parms_vec)

y_lims <- c(0, max(ode_out[,2:3]))
plot(x = ode_out[,1], ode_out[,2], ylim = y_lims, type = "l")
  lines(ode_out[,1], ode_out[,3], col = "tomato")

Phase plane (state space)

plot(ode_out[,2], ode_out[,3], type = "l", lwd = 1.5, col = "skyblue", xlab = "N1", ylab = "N2", las = 1)

Phase plane analysis

lims <- c(0, 30)
trash <- flowField(deriv = mut_fun, xlim = lims, ylim = lims, parameters = parms_vec, state.names = c("N1", "N2"), add = F)

trash <- trajectory(deriv = mut_fun, y0 = init_vec, tlim = c(0, 50), parameters = parms_vec, state.names = c("N1", "N2"))
